lines.text: We've crossed the line tonight, tonight / And an easy hello, but the hardest goodbye
So drive to the yellow lines, the yellow lines
I'm fallin', I'm fallin', fallin' after you / After you, yeah, yeah, you
Tell me 'cause I need to know if it's really gonna be you / Who'll be around and stay around, yeah
Take the ride for me / Pick a side for me, never hide from me / What's goin' on?
I wanna know who to trust if it isn't you / If it isn't you / Then it's alright
It takes time to put your guard down / And once it's down and comfortable / Then it feels right, then it feels right
And if you're fallin', I'm fallin' / I'm fallin', fallin' after you / And if you love it, I love it / I love it, I love it too
Tell me if I doubt you I'm wrong for it, I'm wrong for it / If anybody's in my corner, it's you
That nobody, no face could take you away / 'Cause there's a line to this thing we got
To tell the truth, I've only wanted you, baby
At the end of it all, I'm coming back to you / At the end of it all, I'm coming home to you / There's no one else
We crossed the line / The line / We crossed the line
